author: Jasim A Basheer (https://x.com/jasim_ab)
abstract: Build and modify Sapporta applications: discover project tables and endpoints, create schema-as-code tables, insert and query data safely, write Hono/ts-rest domain endpoints, build custom frontend and table/grid views, author route-based report APIs and screens, configure report link resolvers, and troubleshoot common Sapporta native-module issues.
